template: Find the z-score when x={x}, μ={mu}, σ={sigma}
A student guesses on {n} multiple choice questions (4 options each). What is P(X={k})?
Calls arrive at rate λ={lambda} per minute. What is P(X={k})?
Using the empirical rule, what percent of data lies within {sd} standard deviations of the mean?
10 coin flips. What distribution models the number of heads?
explanation: Fixed number of trials, two outcomes per trial, constant probability.

template: Customers arrive at an average rate of 4 per minute. What distribution models this?
explanation: Poisson models counts of events occurring in a fixed time interval.

template: Human heights with a mean and standard deviation.
explanation: Continuous symmetric distribution defined by μ and σ.
